[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001 2
1 1011001 4
2 0100000 1
3 0000110 2
4 1101100 4
5 0010000 1
6 1001000 2
7 0000000 a

01 10 0111110 5
12 21 1011110 5
23 32 1011101 5
34 43 1011001 4 match 1
45 54 1111101 6
56 65 1100111 5
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a

13 31 1010111 5
24 42 1011101 5
35 53 1110101 5
46 64 1011111 6

60 06 1101111 6
71 17 1111111 a

36 63 1010111 5
47 74 1111101 6
50 05 0101110 4
61 16 1010111 5
72 27 1111101 6

15 51 0110110 4
26 62 1001111 5
37 73 1111101 6
